strings.confirm_organize:
{path}

Files in this folder will be moved into category subfolders. Continue?
strings.confirm_undo: The last operation moved {n} file(s) on {date}. Undo it?
strings.preview_scanning: (Scanning PDF and Word documents for CV content...)
strings.verbose_hint: Tip: a file in the wrong category? Tick 'Diagnostic details' and re-run Preview.
strings.reason_content_not_cv: {src} not a CV ({n} chars, no match)
strings.warn_undo_write_failed: WARNING: could not write undo log: {err}
strings.update_confirm_body:
Version v{ver} is available (current: v{cur}).
Download size: {size}.

Download and install now?
strings.update_apply_ready: The new version has been downloaded. The app will close and restart automatically.
strings.drop_hint: Tip: you can drag and drop a folder onto this window.
strings.settings_destination_hint: When set, organized files go here instead of staying in the source folder. Leave empty to organize in place.
strings.settings_auto_hint: When enabled, the app keeps a tray icon and re-organizes the watched folder on a schedule. Closing the window minimizes to tray instead of quitting.
strings.auto_no_folder_set: Auto-organize is enabled but no watched folder is set. Open Settings to configure it.
strings.page_home_subtitle: Preview and run the active profile against the selected folder.
strings.page_home_banner: Pick a folder above, then Preview to see how the active profile will classify files. Organize moves them; Undo reverts the last run.
strings.page_folders_subtitle: Recent locations, optional destination library, watched folder.
strings.page_folders_banner: Destination folder centralises everything in one library. Watched folder is the source for background auto-organize.
strings.page_rules_subtitle: User-defined conditions and actions, evaluated in order.
strings.page_categories_subtitle: Extension-based groupings and their target folders.
strings.page_profiles_subtitle: Save and switch between different organization configurations.
strings.page_profiles_banner: Each profile contains its own rules, categories, and settings. Switch profiles to use different organization configurations for different purposes.
strings.no_rules_hint: Click + New Rule to define one. Rules run before categories and can move, copy, or skip files based on name, extension, size, age, or path.
strings.appearance_hint: Switch between dark and light. Applies immediately.
strings.topbar.tooltip.pick_folder: Choose a folder to scan. You can also drag and drop one anywhere in this window.
strings.common.name: Name
Recommended — Rules are checked first, unmatched files use categories.
strings.settings.org_mode.categories_only.label: Categories only
strings.settings.org_mode.categories_only.hint: Simple mode — Only use category-based organization.
strings.settings.org_mode.rules_only.label: Rules only
strings.settings.org_mode.rules_only.hint: Advanced — Only files matching rules are organized.
strings.page.home.tooltip.open_in_explorer: Reveal the selected folder in Windows Explorer.
strings.page.home.tooltip.history: Browse past organize runs and roll them back.
strings.page.home.tooltip.edit_plan: Multi-select files in the planned grouping and reassign them before Organize runs.
strings.page.home.tooltip.find_duplicates: Scan the current folder for byte-identical copies and send extras to the Recycle Bin.
strings.page.folders.placeholder.destination: Leave empty to organize in place
strings.page.folders.hint.watched: Each folder listed here is scanned on the auto-organize schedule. Add as many as you like — Downloads, Desktop, Pictures, anything that fills up.
strings.page.folders.destination_hint: When set, organized files go here instead of staying in the source folder. Leave empty to organize in place.
strings.page.rules.banner: Rules are checked in order from top to bottom. The first matching rule wins. Use the ↑↓ buttons to reorder priority.
strings.page.settings.recursive_hint: When on, the scanner descends into subfolders but never enters category folders this profile owns. Useful for flattening a messy tree.
strings.page.settings.pdf_inspect_title: Inspect PDF / DOCX content for CV detection
strings.page.settings.pdf_inspect_hint: Opens PDFs and Word documents to find CV-like keywords. Turn off if you want a faster scan and never want content inspection.
strings.page.settings.content_patterns_hint: Define reusable keyword detectors for PDF and DOCX files (like the built-in CV detector). Reference them from rules using a 'Content matches' condition.
strings.page.settings.org_mode_hint: Choose how files are matched for organization.
strings.page.settings.notif_hint: Display a notification when files are organized.
strings.page.settings.background_hint: Pick how the app should organize new files in your watched folders while the window is closed. Scheduled re-checks every few minutes; real-time fires within seconds of a new file.
strings.page.settings.bg_mode.off.label: Off
strings.page.settings.bg_mode.off.hint: The app only acts when you click Organize manually.
strings.page.settings.bg_mode.scheduled.label: Scheduled
strings.page.settings.bg_mode.scheduled.hint: Re-organize watched folders on a fixed interval.
strings.page.settings.bg_mode.realtime.label: Real-time
strings.page.settings.bg_mode.realtime.hint: Organize each new file as it arrives (uses watchdog).
strings.dialog.pick_folder.title: Pick a folder
strings.dialog.pick_folder.body: Use the picker at the top right to choose a folder first.
strings.dialog.pick_folder.body_duplicates: Pick a folder first to scan it for duplicates.
strings.dialog.pick_folder.body_history: Pick a folder first to view its undo history.
strings.dialog.pick_folder.caption: Select folder
strings.dialog.pick_color.title: Pick a color
strings.dialog.no_profile.title: No profile
strings.dialog.no_profile.body: Create a profile from the Profiles tab.
strings.dialog.no_preview.title: No preview yet
strings.dialog.no_preview.body: Run Preview first so you can see what will move. Run anyway?
strings.dialog.confirm.title: Confirm
strings.dialog.open_folder.title: Open folder
strings.dialog.export_failed.title: Export failed
strings.dialog.import_failed.title: Import failed
strings.dialog.export_profile.caption: Export profile
strings.dialog.import_profile.caption: Import profile
strings.dialog.undo_last.title: Undo last run
strings.dialog.undo_last.body:
Reverse the most recent organize on:
{folder}
strings.dialog.undo_complete.title: Undo complete
strings.dialog.undo.title: Undo
strings.dialog.delete_rule.title: Delete rule
strings.dialog.delete_category.title: Delete category
strings.dialog.delete_category.body: Remove the '{name}' category? Files already in this category folder are not affected.
strings.dialog.delete_profile.title: Delete profile
strings.dialog.delete_profile.body: Remove the profile '{name}'? Files already on disk are not touched.
strings.dialog.profile_cannot_delete.title: Cannot delete
strings.dialog.profile_cannot_delete.body: At least one profile must exist.
strings.dialog.profile_edit.title: Edit profile
strings.dialog.profile_edit.placeholder.name: e.g. Work, Downloads, Photos
strings.dialog.profile_create.title: New profile
strings.dialog.profile_create.placeholder.name: e.g. Work
strings.dialog.profile_create.hint: Templates pre-fill rules and category target folders. You can edit everything afterwards.
strings.dialog.rule_edit.placeholder.name: e.g. Old invoices
strings.dialog.rule_edit.label.name: Rule name
strings.dialog.rule_edit.copy_check: Copy instead of move (leave the source file in place)
strings.dialog.plan_editor.title: Edit organize plan
strings.dialog.plan_editor.intro: Multi-select files (Ctrl+click / Shift+click), choose a category from the dropdown, then hit Reassign.
strings.dialog.plan_editor.tooltip.remove: Don't move the selected files when Organize runs.
strings.dialog.plan_editor.preview.empty_hint: Select a file in the list to preview it.
strings.dialog.plan_editor.preview.multi_hint: Preview only renders for a single selection.
strings.dialog.plan_editor.preview.no_preview_ge: No preview available for this file type.
strings.dialog.duplicates.title: Find duplicates
strings.dialog.duplicates.tooltip.keep_oldest: Tick every duplicate except the oldest in each group.
strings.dialog.duplicates.warn_no_trash: send2trash is not installed; deletion will be permanent.
strings.dialog.duplicates.status.none: No duplicates found in this folder.
strings.dialog.duplicates.nothing_body: Tick the duplicate files you want to remove first.
strings.dialog.duplicates.confirm_trash: Send {n} file(s) to the Recycle Bin?
strings.dialog.duplicates.done.title: Done
strings.dialog.content_patterns.title: Content patterns
strings.dialog.content_patterns.intro: Content patterns are reusable keyword detectors that scan the text of PDF and DOCX files. Reference one from a rule by adding a 'Content matches' condition.
strings.dialog.content_patterns.placeholder.name: e.g. Invoice, Contract, Report
strings.dialog.content_patterns.strong_label: Strong keywords (any one hit = match) — comma or newline separated
strings.dialog.content_patterns.weak_label: Weak keywords (need N hits to match)
strings.dialog.content_patterns.placeholder.weak: amount due, payment terms, total, vat
strings.dialog.content_patterns.remove_body: Remove the pattern '{name}'? Any rules using it will stop matching until you point them elsewhere.
strings.dialog.category_edit.placeholder.name: e.g. Receipts
strings.dialog.category_edit.placeholder.target: Subfolder name on disk (defaults to the category name)
strings.dialog.category_edit.hint: Extensions are matched case-insensitively. Use a leading dot.
strings.dialog.stats.title: Organize complete
strings.dialog.undo_history.title: Undo history
strings.dialog.undo_history.tooltip.clear: Delete the undo log file. Files are not affected.
strings.dialog.undo_history.clear_body: Delete the undo log? The files already on disk stay where they are; you just lose the ability to roll back from this dialog.
strings.dialog.about.title: About Auto File Organizer
strings.dialog.about.heading: Auto File Organizer
strings.dialog.about.description: Sorts a folder's files into category subfolders using rules, extension categories, and PDF/DOCX content inspection.
